summary: Restored the orchestrator-owned worktree state file back to its dispatch-time baseline and aligned its timestamp to the backup snapshot so `.kb-run/state.json` is no longer modified in the worktree. Verified that the required `drift-report.md` content remains present, including the discrete wrong-valued Android rows and separate canonical `stroke.*` versus `sizing.stroke.*` coverage.

acceptance_criteria_evidence.evidence: `surface.scrim-soft` and `border.glass` are present as discrete MISSING rows with the required expected light/dark values. Verified with `grep 'surface.scrim-soft\|border.glass' .spec/prds/v2/tasks/sprint-03-design-system-alignment/drift-report.md`.

`map.paper`, `map.contour`, `map.contour-faint`, `map.style.light`, and `map.style.dark` are present as discrete rows. Verified with `grep 'map.paper\|map.contour\|map.style' .spec/prds/v2/tasks/sprint-03-design-system-alignment/drift-report.md | wc -l` => `6`.

Canonical theme `stroke.sm/md/lg` rows are present and remain separate from dimensions-schema `sizing.stroke.sm/md/lg` rows. Verified with `grep 'sizing.stroke' .spec/prds/v2/tasks/sprint-03-design-system-alignment/drift-report.md | wc -l` and spot checks for `stroke.md`/`sizing.stroke.md`.
`signal.hover` plus all `status.*-tint` rows are present as discrete rows. Verified with `grep 'signal.hover\|status.*tint' .spec/prds/v2/tasks/sprint-03-design-system-alignment/drift-report.md`.

The report contains the Android status column, `Wrong-Valued Android Rows`, and `naming.mismatch` coverage. Verified with `grep -i 'android\|kotlin\|naming.mismatch\|camelCase' .spec/prds/v2/tasks/sprint-03-design-system-alignment/drift-report.md`.
`git diff --name-only | grep -vE 'drift-report\.md' | grep -E '\.swift|\.kt' | wc -l` => `0`; no production Swift or Kotlin files are modified.
